name: IPR-4A "Colossus"
description: The Colossus is a full industrial-scale fabrication platform combining plasma-arc disaggregation of feedstock with directed molecular reassembly. Raw regolith or pre-sorted concentrate enters a plasma feedstock processor that separates and ionises elemental streams; these streams feed a large-format vacuum-arc deposition cell capable of building structures up to 20 m in any dimension. The process is efficient enough to produce tier-4 industrial equipment — plasma arc miners, advanced refinery columns, and autonomous prospector chassis — from near-100% locally-sourced feedstock on resource-rich bodies.
